THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF C & C OF SF OFFICE OF TREASURER TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GASTON, JAMES $3,419.99 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,419.99, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
